user.title: Aquarium LED Cockpit
user.description: Install the aquarium blueprint and export dashboard snippets into your Home Assistant configuration.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Aquarium LED Cockpit instance is supported.

init.title: Aquarium LED Cockpit options
init.description: Choose which files should be exported automatically.

install_resources.name: Install or export resources
install_resources.description: Copy packaged blueprint and dashboard files into the Home Assistant config directory.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry id
config_entry_id.description: Optional config entry id if you need to target a specific entry.

export_dashboard_snippets.name: Export dashboard snippets
export_dashboard_snippets.description: Export the sensor based dashboard YAML snippets.

export_legacy_files.name: Export legacy files
export_legacy_files.description: Export the input_text helper package and the older dashboard variants.

overwrite_existing.name: Overwrite existing files
overwrite_existing.description: Replace files that already exist at the target location.

set_dashboard_status.name: Set dashboard status
set_dashboard_status.description: Update the live Aquarium LED Cockpit sensor from an automation.

status_json.name: Status JSON
status_json.description: Compact JSON object with the aquarium status payload.
